aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI citations with structured content and a strong GBP presence, but it lacks conversational content and authority signals to maximize AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema to directly address common HVAC queries.
Expand on conversational content that aligns with AI search patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and boost visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for explaining HVAC maintenance or repair processes.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content tailored for AI search patterns.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed pricing information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding on service-related conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish industry authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models lack detailed content to cite in responses.
agency_pitch.solution: Develop conversational content and implement structured data to align with AI search patterns, ensuring visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Optimize for Conversational Search Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content for AI search and boost your lead generation.
